headline: Iran Ceasefire Triggers Tech Rally; Cloud Giants Gain Market Momentum
summary: Trump's Iran ceasefire announcement sparked a broad tech stock rally, with Alphabet, Meta, Amazon, and Nvidia among the beneficiaries. Easing geopolitical tension reduces near-term risk premiums on capital-intensive infrastructure investments that cloud providers depend on. The relief rally signals renewed investor appetite for AI and cloud infrastructure spend after weeks of macro-driven uncertainty.
oci_implication: Improved market sentiment and reduced geopolitical risk could accelerate enterprise cloud commitment decisions that were stalled pending macro clarity — a window OCI should exploit with targeted outreach to deals in late-stage pipeline. Lower risk appetite volatility also supports the case for large, multi-year OCI contracts as customers regain confidence in long-horizon infrastructure bets.
